com.pax.poslink.peripheries

Interface SerialPortParameters.ComPort

  • Enclosing class:
    SerialPortParameters

    public static interface SerialPortParameters.ComPort
    The com port options.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int COM1
      COM1
      static int COM2
      COM2 (usually used internally by the system, SP30 does not include this port)
      static int PINPAD
      PINPAD (SP30 does not include this port)
      static int USBDEV
      USBDEV (USB device mode port)
